title: mentha × niliaca var. alopecuroides
intro: Mentha × niliaca var. alopecuroides, also known as Woolly Mint, is a hybrid of the mint species Mentha niliaca, characterized by its distinctive woolly leaves and stems. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its cooling and digestive effects. The health benefits of Mentha × niliaca var. alopecuroides include relief from nausea, stomach cramps, and indigestion, as well as its ability to alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, making it a versatile addition to various herbal remedies.
